name: cypherpoet-toolchest
description: A curated catalog of Claude Code plugins: agent tooling, dev workflow utilities, themed skill collections, and more.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-agent-tooling
plugins.description: Bundle of Claude Code agent-tooling plugins for docs search, memory consolidation, and session handoff/harvest.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-app-store-connect-kit
plugins.description: Hands-on App Store Connect submission workflow and console navigation.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-apple-app-icons
plugins.description: Apple app icons end to end: design one that converts in the App Store (tap-through, audit, A/B testing) and ship it correctly — Icon Composer Liquid Glass .icon plus an appiconset fallback for older OS versions.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-apple-app-store-screenshots
plugins.description: Apple App Store screenshot and app preview specifications.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-apple-human-interface-guidelines
plugins.description: Thorough distillation of Apple's complete Human Interface Guidelines across all six platforms (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, visionOS, watchOS) — component-by-component best practices, hard specs (tap targets, type sizes, color tokens), per-platform deltas, and choose-the-right-component decision tables, with a synced reference corpus that tracks Apple's updates.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-blender-kit
plugins.description: Blender 3D modeling and MCP integration.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-changelog-maintenance
plugins.description: Maintain a project's CHANGELOG.md in Keep-a-Changelog format.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-claude-docs-search
plugins.description: Look up answers about Claude Code features and behavior in the official Claude Code documentation.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-claude-memory-consolidation
plugins.description: Audit and consolidate Claude's per-project auto-memory directory, deduping, repairing, and pruning with per-cluster approval.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-emoji-commits
plugins.description: Write expressive git commit messages with Gitmoji.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-excalidraw-kit
plugins.description: Comprehensive Excalidraw mastery: authoring .excalidraw scene files by hand (the JSON format, element model, arrow/text binding, and a diagrams-that-argue design methodology), plus the @excalidraw/excalidraw developer API (React component, initialData, the convertToExcalidrawElements skeleton API, restore, SVG/PNG/clipboard export, and Mermaid-to-Excalidraw), shipped with scripts to validate a scene, render it to PNG, and insert icon-library elements — grounded in the official Excalidraw documentation.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-expo-kit
plugins.description: Expo / React Native prototyping.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-git-flow
plugins.description: Bundle of git commit and changelog hygiene plugins: emoji commits and changelog maintenance.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-git-hygiene
plugins.description: Keep local git state tidy: sync branches with the remote, and clean up stale branches and worktrees with per-item approval.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-google-filament-kit
plugins.description: Comprehensive working knowledge of Google Filament, the real-time physically-based rendering engine — the PBR material model and lighting/IBL, the material definition language and matc compiler, the core engine API (Engine/Scene/View/Renderer/Camera, resources, gltfio), and per-binding setup for C++, Web (JS/WASM), and Android, distilled from the official documentation with a synced reference corpus that tracks Filament releases.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-marketplace-kit
plugins.description: Maintainer toolkit for running a Claude Code plugin marketplace — publish plugins, audit marketplace and catalog sync, regenerate the local catalog, and verify dependency-version tags.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-mobile-dev
plugins.description: iOS App Store publishing best practices.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-react-three-fiber-kit
plugins.description: React Three Fiber (R3F) + drei tooling for declarative Three.js in React.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-session-handoff
plugins.description: Write a structured handoff document so a fresh agent can resume long-running work without losing context.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-session-harvest
plugins.description: Harvest a session's learnings into their right homes: a memory, a suggested repo edit (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, docs, or a hook), or a PR that improves one of your own agent skills.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-sf-symbols-kit
plugins.description: Apple SF Symbols end to end: find the right symbol with natural language, export clean recolorable SVGs at any of the 9 weights, browse an HTML gallery, build full icon sets, and convert your own SVG art into importable custom SF Symbol templates.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-svg-tools
plugins.description: SVG optimization and cleanup.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-swift-xcode-kit
plugins.description: Swift and Xcode development kit: SwiftUI best practices and 2027 SDK migration, UIKit multi-window modernization, XCTest-to-Swift-Testing migration, security-hardening audits of Xcode build settings, C -fbounds-safety guidance, and on-device/simulator UI verification.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-threejs-kit
plugins.description: Three.js / WebGPU / WebGL tooling.

plugins.name: cypherpoet-webgl-kit
plugins.description: Raw WebGL2 + GLSL shader tooling.
